title: Catching Up With Friends
description: 今天练习朋友间自然寒暄和更新近况.

items.phrase: How have you been holding up?
items.cn: 比 How are you 更关心一点.
examples: How have you been holding up with work?
How have you been holding up lately?
How have you been holding up after the move?
dialogue: How have you been holding up?

items.phrase: I've been meaning to text you.
examples: I've been meaning to text you all week.
I've been meaning to text you about that restaurant.
I've been meaning to check in.
dialogue: I've been meaning to text you.
Same. This week got away from me.

items.cn: 比 What happened 更自然开放.
examples: What's new with you these days?
dialogue: Not much, just trying to survive June.

items.cn: 回应别人压力时很好用.
examples: That sounds like a lot. Are you okay?
That sounds like a lot to deal with.
That sounds like a lot for one week.
dialogue: I had three deadlines and a family thing.

examples: I'm glad you brought it up.
dialogue: I didn't know if I should mention it.
